description: A candid group photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) taken inside a U.S. Department of Labor conference/meeting room in Washington, D.C. About a dozen people in business attire stand in a posed line for a group portrait. Behind them is a wall-mounted oval blue plaque reading 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR, WASHINGTON, D.C.' (the Frances Perkins building seal/aerial graphic), flanked by U.S. flags and other flags with gold eagle finials, and the carpet is dark blue. One person at right uses a red power wheelchair. The image accompanies the HIRE Vets Medallion Award announcement in the tweet; it carries no slogans, headlines, or designed typography, and there is no on-image text.
